org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml

Class AbstractXMLReader.ViewDescription

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLReader.ViewDescription
  • Enclosing class:
    AbstractXMLReader

    protected static class AbstractXMLReader.ViewDescription
extends Object
    Describes a view.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:

      Replies the anchor figures.

      Replies the view component that has the specified id.

      Replies the edge figures.
      Iterable<UUID> getLayeredFigures()
      Replies the figures, one per layer.

      Replies the identifier of the model object that should be associated to the figure with the specified identifier.

      Replies the node figures.

      Replies the other types of figures.

      Replies the view id.
